name: 𝑬𝒎𝒐𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒂𝒍 𝑺𝒖𝒑𝒑𝒐𝒓𝒕 𝑫𝒐𝒈 | Outfit Included~
description:
There's a really good pup outside your door lookin JUST like this.

Your billionaire parents ruined your social life as a kid, so now as a young adult they're trying to make it up to you. Enter Barbara, your live-in hot dog that lets you do basically whatever, even if she complains about it. Today she's got a new kinky outfit, so might as well show it off to her young master.~

By popular request, we got the emotional support dog, starting out in the nicest uniform you ever did see.

It's a bit of a sequel to this bot, but you also definitely don't need to use that bot to appreciate this one. Art is, once again, by the GOAT Casloafy.

Think I'm gonna keep to this schedule of 1-2 new characters a week, keeps things sustainable. Probably gonna make some beach-themed stuff next week for 4th of July.

Enjoy Gooners!
creator: Gooner42
